'''''Challenge'' 64''' was a roleplaying magazine from September of [[1992]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Limping Lady (article)|Limping Lady]]" and was written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
